_meta.notes: Rate card extracted from demo quotation. Update by running make_quotation.py --update-rates <new.xlsx>

2mp_bullet.description: 2MP fixed bullet network camera, H.265 codec, high compression rate, Built-in IR LED, max IR distance: 30m, 12V DC/PoE, IP67 protection

2mp_eyeball.model: 2MP Lite IR Fixed-focal Eyeball Network Camera

4mp_varifocal.description: 4MP motorized varifocal bullet camera, H.265 codec, motorized zoom lens, Built-in IR LED, max IR distance: 40m, 12V DC/PoE, IP67 protection

4mp_anpr.description: 4MP ANPR bullet camera with LPR technology for license plate recognition

16ch_2mp.description: 16 Channel 4K NVR, Non POE, 1U, 2HDDs up to 16TB, P2P remote surveillance, AI by Camera

16ch_kpoi.description: 16 channel NVR compatible with KPOI 4MP camera system

16ch_anpr.description: 16 channel NVR for ANPR/LPR camera system with license plate recognition support

16port_poe.description: 16-Port Gigabit PoE Switch designed for security industry, 2 Hi-PoE ports up to 60W, 360W total power

27u.description: 27U standard floor mount server rack with wheels and cooling
